headline: Is a Beat in Store for Simon Property Stock in Q1 Earnings?
summary: SPG reports Q1 2026 results on May 11. Revenue and rent gains, plus firm occupancy, may have offset higher interest costs and tenant stress.

headline: Oportun Financial Corporation (OPRT) Matches Q1 Earnings Estimates
summary: Oportun Financial (OPRT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0.00% and -0.46%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
